description.ca: Recurs seleccionat de linear algebra matrices per construir una base sòlida en finances quantitatives. Inclou problemes i [solucions oficials](https://math.mit.edu/~gs/linearalgebra/ila6/ila6sols.pdf).
description.en: A selected linear algebra matrices resource for building a strong quantitative finance foundation. It includes problemes i [solucions oficials](https://math.mit.edu/~gs/linearalgebra/ila6/ila6sols.pdf).
